creator: viktor.stujber+freebsd-bugs_v4CCPfay@gmail.com
text: I have transplanted the contents of FreeBSD-12.0-STABLE-amd64-20190207-r343863-bootonly.iso's /boot directory, minus the kernel, into the 12.0-releng host that has the issue. The updated loader works and I am currently using it as a workaround.
